# Shared Structs (Unity)

## C# FileA:
```csharp
[SharedStruct]
public struct MyStructA
{
    public int a;
    public uint b;
    public Vector3 c;
    public Vector2Int d;
    public MyStructB e;
}

[SharedStruct]
public struct MyStructB
{
    public Vector3 a;
    public Vector3 b;
    public Vector3 c;
    public MyStructC d;
}
```
## C# FileB:
```csharp
[SharedStruct]
public struct MyStructC
{
    public int a;
    public int b;
}
```
## Auto-Generated HLSL FileA:
```hlsl
#ifndef MyFileA_AutoGenerated
#define MyFileA_AutoGenerated

#include "MyFileB_AutoGenerated.hlsl"

struct MyStructB {
	float3 a;
	float3 b;
	float3 c;
	MyStructC d;
};

struct MyStructA {
	int a;
	uint b;
	float3 c;
	int2 d;
	MyStructB e;
};

#endif
```
## Auto-Generated HLSL FileB:
```hlsl
#ifndef MyFileB_AutoGenerated
#define MyFileB_AutoGenerated

struct MyStructD {
	int a;
	int b;
};

struct MyStructC {
	int a;
	int b;
	MyStructD c;
	BitFlags flags;
};

#endif
```
